omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may allow the third-party online advertising network such as Google Admob and Facebook ads to collect information about your use of our App over time for playing or displaying ads that may be of interest to you. To personalize the content of promotional communications relating to products and services offered by third parties on Google AdMob. You can find more information on how Google AdMob processes your personal data by visiting Google's Privacy & Terms.
